message:
Fix docstring handling - discard string constants with _ =

Docstrings (bare string expressions) caused Zig compilation errors:
'value of type *const [N:0]u8 ignored'

Fix: Assign docstrings to _ in genExprStmt()

Before:
"""Module docstring"""  ->  """Module docstring""";  (error)

After:
"""Module docstring"""  ->  _ = """Module docstring""";  (works)

Files now working:
- examples/function_basic.py
- examples/test_enumerate.py
- All files with module/function docstrings

Test results: 14/89 passing (unchanged from baseline)
No regressions introduced.

Modified: src/codegen/native/statements.zig (+6 lines)
